---
pagetitle: "Home"
page-layout: full
format: html
---

<section class="landing-page">
<img class="landing-chart-bg" src="images/home-chart1.png" alt="">

<div class="landing-hero">
<div class="landing-copy">
<div class="landing-name" role="heading" aria-level="1">Harsha<br>Halgamuwe<br>Hewage</div>

<p class="landing-tagline">
I work on forecasting for social good, uncertainty, and decision-making, turning data into practical tools and learning materials for real-world problems.
</p>

<div class="landing-social" aria-label="Social links">
<a href="mailto:hewagehrc@gmail.com" aria-label="E-mail"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i></a>
<a href="https://github.com/chamara7h" aria-label="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/harshachamara/" aria-label="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=XgQYqK8AAAAJ&hl=en" aria-label="Google Scholar"><i class="bi bi-bookmark-star-fill"></i></a>
</div>

<div class="landing-links">
<a href="about/"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i><span>About</span></a>
<a href="projects/"><i class="bi bi-bar-chart-fill"></i><span>Projects</span></a>
<a href="lab/"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i><span>Learning Lab</span></a>
<a href="talks/"><i class="bi bi-mic-fill"></i><span>Talks</span></a>
</div>

<p class="landing-note">Design inspired by traditional Sri Lankan Wes Muna motifs, which I connect with healing, community care, and the social good spirit behind my work.</p>
</div>

<div class="landing-visual">
<img class="landing-flower landing-flower-top" src="images/landing-flower-gold.png" alt="">
<img class="landing-artifact" src="images/landing-wes-muna.png" alt="Wes Muna inspired figure using a laptop in blue and gold tones">
<img class="landing-flower landing-flower-bottom" src="images/landing-flower-gold.png" alt="">
<img class="landing-divider-art" src="images/landing-divider-gold.png" alt="">
</div>
</div>
</section>
